problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Microbiome. Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
